'''Tix''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Communications Officer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He later defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="m20">''[[Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction]]''</ref>

{{Char-stub}}

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual, Tix served as a [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]] aboard the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Liquidator (Imperial II-class)|''Liquidator'']], which held station in the [[Delrakkin system/Legends|Delrakkin system]] around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The ''Liquidator'' was the command ship of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Termo]], who in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] was expecting a transmission from [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], who on last report had taken the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] to the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] in order to destroy the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Great Temple/Legends|base]] on the [[Yavin 4/Legends|fourth]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]].<ref name="aoy4" />

While awaiting contact from Tarkin, Tix was approached by Termo personally, who asked the communications officer to verify the frequency of the [[hyperspace transponder]], to ensure that they had not missed Tarkin's message. Tix confirmed that there was no technical discrepancy, and offered to attempt to open communications with the Death Star, but Termo had received strict instructions to do nothing until they heard from Tarkin. Trying to find some other explanation, Termo quizzed Tix as to whether storms on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]] could be disrupting communications—the communications officer denied that there would be any such disturbance, given their distance from the planet surface. Tix watched on with curiosity as Termo began to doubt himself, before ordering [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Skeezer]] to the ''Liquidator''{{'s}} forward launch bay.<ref name="aoy4" />

==Personality and traits==
Tix was terrified of his commanding officer, Admiral Termo, to such a degree that he feared meeting the admiral's gaze. Tix had served under Termo long enough to understand that the admiral's calm tone could disguise his displeasure.<ref name="aoy4" />
